purpose: High-confidence Dr.Martens model data staged before merging into compressed root JSON masters.

audit.reason: Root data JSON files are currently compressed into single-line masters. The staged payload is verified and ready, but the root masters should be updated with a formatter or sync script to avoid damaging existing app assets.
sourceNotes: 1460 and 1461 are high-confidence classic Dr. Martens model numbers.
Official and reliable public references identify 1460 as the 8-eye boot and 1461 as the 3-eye shoe.
Standalone broad brand nicknames are intentionally excluded from aliases/searchKeywords.
